channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] palmier-io/palmier-pro — macOS video editor built for AI
item.description: Palmier-pro is a macOS video editor built for AI workflows.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] koala73/worldmonitor — Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
item.description: Worldmonitor is a real-time AI-powered dashboard aggregating news, geopolitical intelligence, and infrastructure monitoring data.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] aishwaryanr/awesome-generative-ai-guide — A one stop repository for generative AI research updates, interview resources, notebooks and much more!
item.description: GitHub repository collecting generative AI research updates, interview resources, and computational notebooks.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] BuilderIO/agent-native — A framework for building agent-native applications.
item.description: BuilderIO/agent-native enables development of applications built around autonomous agents.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/chopratejas — Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
item.description: Tool compresses outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks, achieving 60-95% token reduction and same answers for LLMs.

item.title: [Hacker News] Project Valhalla, Explained: How a Decade of Work Arrives in JDK 28
item.description: Project Valhalla, Explained: How a Decade of Work Arrives in JDK 28

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] GLM > GPT? GLM-5.2 passes vibe check; Z.ai forecasts Open Fable by December
item.description: [AINews] GLM > GPT? GLM-5.2 passes vibe check; Z.ai forecasts Open Fable by December

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Computational Identifiability
item.description: Paper introduces computational identifiability framework distinguishing finite search-based estimation from theoretical identifiability's idealized asymptotic assumptions in causal inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When to Trust, How to Distill: Multi-Foundation Model Guidance for Lightweight, Robust Scientific Time Series Forecasting
item.description: Guard uses multi-teacher distillation with adaptive routing to efficiently train lightweight time-series forecasters from foundation models for scientific domain applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Closing the Social-Semantic Gap: SPSD for Edge-Based Prompt Compression in Cloud LLM Inference
item.description: SPSD compresses prompts on edge devices using semantic distillation before cloud LLM processing, reducing inference energy while maintaining response quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Performance Analysis and Optimization of 3D Generative Diffusion Models across GPU Architectures
item.description: Performance analysis of Med-DDPM across NVIDIA GPUs identified inefficiencies; proposed optimizations reduced SM cycles by 100x and improved Tensor Core utilization without degrading quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Information Lattice Learning as Probabilistic Graphical Model Structure Learning
item.description: Information lattice learning is interpreted as structure learning for constraint-based probabilistic factor graphs using interpretable quotient variables.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Weibull Weight-Scale Parameter Evolution under AdamW Training Dynamics
item.description: Study reveals three forces governing transformer weight-scale growth during AdamW training, with alignment force dominating the initial growth phase.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Zero-Inflated Gaussian Distributions Enable Parameter-Space Sparsity in Estimation-of-Distribution Algorithms
item.description: Zero-inflated Gaussian distributions enable sparse parameter optimization in estimation-of-distribution algorithms without hand-designed sparsity operators.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Human-like autonomy emerges from self-play and a pinch of human data
item.description: Self-play RL trains autonomous driving policies with human-aligned behavior using minimal human data (30 minutes) as regularization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ProMUSE: Progressive Multi-modal Uncertainty-guided Staged Evidential Alzheimer Disease Classification
item.description: ProMUSE adaptively incorporates costly MRI/PET imaging only when needed, reducing acquisition costs while maintaining Alzheimer's disease diagnostic accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] cAPM: Continual AI-Assisted Pace-Mapping with Active Learning
item.description: cAPM uses continual learning to transfer knowledge from previous pace-mapping procedures to reduce sites needed for identifying ventricular tachycardia ablation targets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Protein Representation Learning with Secondary-Structure and Energy-Filtered Hydrogen-Bond Graphs
item.description: Graph neural network incorporating secondary structure and energy-filtered hydrogen bonds improves protein representation learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-Informed Discovery of Yield Functions in Plasticity via Convex Neural Representations
item.description: Physics-informed neural network framework discovers anisotropic yield functions from displacement and force data without direct stress observations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Cost-Optimal LLM Routing with Limited User Feedback under User Satisfaction Guarantees
item.description: SLARouter algorithm routes LLM requests to minimize costs while guaranteeing Service Level Agreement compliance using sparse production feedback.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Emyx: Fast and efficient all-atom protein generation
item.description: Emyx, a smaller protein generation model, outperforms larger competitors on enzyme design benchmarks with 4x faster training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Hybrid GNN-FEM Framework for Phase-Field Fracture Simulation. Physics-Preserving Hybridization for Generalizable Surrogate Modeling
item.description: Hybrid GNN-FEM framework accelerates phase-field fracture simulations by replacing expensive phase-field updates with neural network surrogates while maintaining physical consistency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] How Linear Is a Transformer Feed-Forward Block? Per-Block Linear Recoverability Is Learned, Not Architectural
item.description: Transformer feed-forward blocks vary in linearity across layers as learned property, not architectural constraint, enabling model compression.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] VERITAS: Verifier-Guided Proof Search for Zero-Shot Formal Theorem Proving
item.description: VERITAS improves formal theorem proving by routing verifier signals through two-phase proof search combining sampling and critic-guided exploration.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Thermodynamic Signatures of Reasoning: Free-Energy and Spectral-Form-Factor Diagnostics for Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
item.description: Thermodynamic spectral descriptors derived from attention mechanisms improve hallucination detection in LLMs without model updates.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FlexLAM: Resolving the Bottleneck Trade-off in Latent Action Learning
item.description: FlexLAM resolves latent action model bottlenecks by replacing fixed-capacity codes with variable-length alternatives trained via nested dropout.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spectral DPPs via NEPv: A Scalable Continuous Relaxation of Determinantal MAP for Diversity-Aware Data Selection
item.description: Researchers develop a scalable algorithm for selecting diverse subsets from massive datasets by reformulating NP-hard DPP-MAP as continuous optimization with nonlinear eigenvalue problems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spectral Retrieval-Augmented Time-Series Forecasting
item.description: SpecReTF improves time-series forecasting by using frequency-domain retrieval with amplitude-phase similarity and recency-weighted matching.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Does Text Actually Help? Uncovering and Resolving Text Collapse in Multimodal Time Series Forecasting
item.description: Multimodal time series forecasting suffers from text collapse; REST-TS fixes this by having text predict residuals instead of raw values.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MortarBench: Evaluating Mortgage Loan Origination Agents
item.description: MortarBench benchmark reveals LLM weaknesses in mortgage loan origination, including biases against non-English names, with proposed CRIT framework improving accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] 3D-DLP: Self-Supervised 3D Object-Centric Scene Representation Learning
item.description: 3D-DLP is a self-supervised model that decomposes 3D scenes into object-centric latent particles for robotic manipulation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Can In-Context Learning Support Intrinsic Curiosity?
item.description: Study proves in-context learning cannot unbiasedly serve as efficient world models for intrinsic curiosity exploration in general MDPs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Insulin4RL: Real-Time Insulin Management in the Intensive Care Unit for Offline Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Insulin4RL provides an offline reinforcement learning dataset with naturally irregular clinical data for improving insulin management decisions in intensive care units.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Concept Flow Models: Anchoring Concept-Based Reasoning with Hierarchical Bottlenecks
item.description: Concept Flow Models use hierarchical decision trees to reduce information leakage in interpretable concept-based models while maintaining predictive performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Algebraic Dead Directions in LayerNorm Transformers: A Forward-Pass-Only Diagnostic at LLM Scale
item.description: Researchers identify dead directions in LayerNorm transformers using only scale parameters, avoiding expensive eigendecomposition or forward-pass analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Calibrating Generative Models to Feature Distributions with MMD Finetuning
item.description: kCGM uses maximum mean discrepancy to fine-tune generative models toward target feature distributions while preserving model validity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Interactive Pareto navigation for deep multi-task learning
item.description: Framework enables interactive exploration of trade-offs in multi-task learning by navigating the Pareto front according to user preferences efficiently.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Exposing the Unsaid: Visualizing Hidden LLM Bias through Stochastic Path Aggregation
item.description: TreeTracer visualizes hidden LLM biases by systematically aggregating stochastic text generations into syntax-aligned hierarchical structures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Ensembles of Large Language Models for Identifying EQ-5D Studies in PubMed Based on Their Abstracts
item.description: Ensemble of large language models identifies EQ-5D health outcome studies in PubMed abstracts with 0.74 F1-score accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Disentangling Linguistic Relatedness from Task Alignment in Cross-Lingual Transfer
item.description: Fine-tuning seven LLMs on Arabic shows no Semitic-specific transfer; improvements appear driven by task-format alignment rather than linguistic relatedness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] How LLMs Fail and Generalize in RTL Coding for Hardware Design?
item.description: LLMs plateau at 90.8% pass rate on hardware coding benchmarks, constrained by unsolvable functional errors that pretraining knowledge cannot fully address.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DeepSeek-V4: Towards Highly Efficient Million-Token Context Intelligence
item.description: DeepSeek-V4 Mixture-of-Experts models achieve one-million-token context support with 27% of predecessor inference FLOPs and 10% of KV cache.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Where to Place the Query? Unveiling and Mitigating Positional Bias in In-Context Learning for Diffusion LLMs via Decoding Dynamics
item.description: Query position significantly impacts diffusion LLM in-context learning; Auto-ICL automatically optimizes placement without model retraining.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Pruning via Causal Attribution Preserves Reasoning Performance in Large Language Models
item.description: Causal Attribution Pruning preserves LLM reasoning by identifying critical attention heads via causal impact measurement, achieving 61% gains over magnitude-based methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Detecting Hallucinations for Large Language Model-based Knowledge Graph Reasoning
item.description: LUCID, a new hallucination detection method for LLM-based knowledge graph reasoning, combines attention scores, KG semantics, and structural information for improved accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Sign-Language Datasets at Scale: A Comprehensive Survey on Resources, Benchmarks, and Annotation Standards
item.description: Comprehensive survey catalogs 120 sign-language datasets across 35 languages, analyzing annotation challenges and introducing standardized documentation practices for improved technology development.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Quantifying Aleatoric Uncertainty of In-Context Learning for Robust Measure of LLM Prediction Confidence
item.description: Researchers propose self-function vectors using Bayesian mechanistic interpretability to measure aleatoric uncertainty in language model in-context learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Granularity-Regulated Adaptive Computational Efficiency for Optimal Verification in Test-Time Scaling
item.description: Framework determines optimal verification granularity for test-time scaling, revealing phase transition where fine-grained verification suits large budgets or hard problems, coarse-grained suits low-budget.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Trustworthy Multi-Agent Systems: Mitigating Semantic Drift with the Argent Signaling Protocol
item.description: Researchers introduce Argent Signaling Protocol, adding machine-readable quality signals to multi-agent LLM responses to distinguish repairable from containment failures and improve performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Characterizing Narrative Content in Web-scale LLM Pretraining Data
item.description: Researchers analyze narrative structure in Dolma pretraining corpus using framework measuring agency, setting, events; release NarraBERT model and NarraDolma dataset.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reliability without Validity: A Systematic, Large-Scale Evaluation of LLM-as-a-Judge Models Across Agreement, Consistency, and Bias
item.description: LLM-as-a-Judge validation study: exact-match agreement overstates reliability; 21 judges show position bias, benchmark-dependent ranking shifts despite high test-retest consistency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LaViSA: A Language and Vision Structural Ambiguity Benchmark
item.description: LaViSA benchmark evaluates Vision and Language Models' ability to resolve structural ambiguity using visual scenes, revealing limitations in handling subtle semantic distinctions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A BART-based approach with hierarchical strategy for Vietnamese abstractive multi-document summarization
item.description: A BART-based hierarchical system for Vietnamese multi-document summarization uses golden-summary-driven shortening, achieving 0.2468 ROUGE2-F1 score.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Where Does Social Reasoning Come From? Capability Provenance in Language Models
item.description: Training-data attribution reveals that social and STEM reasoning in language models draw from distinct corpus regions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Before the Labels: How Dataset Construction Shapes Suicidality Detection in Clinical Text
item.description: EHR-based suicidality detection datasets encode specific operationalizations via governance, labeling, and aggregation choices, obscuring clinical heterogeneity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MiqraBERT: Regression-Based Sentence-BERT Finetuning for Biblical Hebrew Parallel Detection
item.description: MiqraBERT, a finetuned BERT model for Biblical Hebrew, detects textual parallels through semantic similarity with strong narrative but weak poetic performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Creating Multilingual Mental Health Dialogue Datasets: Limits of Persona-Based Localization via Nationality and Language
item.description: Research finds that applying English-centric mental health personas to other languages produces clinically inconsistent multilingual datasets; LLMs struggle evaluating non-English depression severity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From 50K to 8.2 Million in 24 Hours: Vozinha's Algorithmic Consecration and the Multilingual Making of World Cup Visibility
item.description: LLM-assisted multilingual discourse analysis reveals how narrative framing across languages drove Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha's viral social media growth.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SAGE-OPD: Selective Agent-Guided Intervention for Multi-Turn On-Policy Distillation
item.description: SAGE-OPD improves multi-turn agent training using selective intervention and confidence-weighted distillation to prevent compounding errors, achieving 13.3% improvement over baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CacheWeaver: Cache-Aware Evidence Ordering for Efficient Grounded RAG Inference
item.description: CacheWeaver, a prompt-layer method, reorders evidence for better prefix caching, reducing RAG inference time-to-first-token by 20-33%.
